steps.title: Salt from each mixture
steps.content:
Low-salt mixture: 3% of x kg → $$0.03x$$ kg salt.
High-salt mixture: 92% of y kg → $$0.92y$$ kg salt.

steps.title: Total salt required
steps.content:
Desired mixture: 30 kg at 5% salt → total salt needed = $$0.05\times30$$ kg.
Set sum of contributions equal to required salt: $$0.03x+0.92y = 0.05\times30$$.
B is correct.
